title: Mellow Mediterranean Kiwifruit Tagine
description: A citrusy and cozy Mediterranean dish featuring kiwifruit, with a cheese-pull effect, made in a claypot and pounded with a mortar and pestle, low in carbs.

ingredients.name: chicken breast
ingredients.notes: boneless and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a mortar and pestle, pound the garlic and oregano into a smooth paste.
In a claypot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the claypot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the kiwifruit, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to the claypot and stir to combine.
Transfer the claypot to the preheated oven and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the claypot from the oven and stir in the feta cheese until melted and well combined.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the tagine and serve hot.
Use a spoon to create a cheese-pull effect when serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
